metadata_policy: Live UI summary is computed without writing files. Clean ZIP metadata is generated inside the ZIP at creation time.

checks.details_bg: Git tracked file list is available for clean ZIP creation.
Clean ZIP should be created after commit/push, when git status is empty.
Tracked files do not include .git, cache, helper patch files, nested ZIPs, or temp artifacts.
ZIP creation uses tracked project files only, so .git and cache folders are excluded by design.

notes_bg: Normal folder ZIP is not safe for this project because it can include .git, __pycache__, .pyc and helper scripts.
The clean checkpoint script uses git tracked files only and refuses to create the ZIP while git status is not clean.
The ZIP creator injects fresh Step 103 metadata into the archive, so the report inside the ZIP matches the ZIP commit.
